李易涵穿越到一本都市高武小说中，成为了小说中女主的反派舔狗。
我堂堂蓝星第一家族少爷，爷爷九阶武圣、父亲八阶武尊，你居然让我当舔狗？
我呸！
叮——
恭喜宿主绑定天命大反派系统。
奖励新手礼包——修罗圣体。
哟，统子哥来的正好！
“李易涵，这么多年我的青春损失费呢？赔给我！”
“好嘞，在这里！”
“是什么？”
“一个大嘴巴子！”
“李易涵，你居然敢打沫沫？敢不敢像个男人一样，和我叶风单挑？”
“单挑？在小爷圣体前跪下吧！”
“李易涵，你还敢上门退婚？那把我女儿的折旧费算一算吧！”
“算？你苏家都给小爷覆灭吧！”
这个世界的天命之子们颤抖吧！你小爷我来了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5d646fe34ab64bac4471866a72a96b13~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一只圆小团","author_id":"","book_id":"7433589751707339838","book_name":"反派，家族无敌我还舔？退婚！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4056人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7433599135950832190","read_count":"4056","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"357669"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"170","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,反派,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/684fb0e9fbd39103aaa2b6038ccba23e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283384&x-signature=mTavVId3QVslCci%2Fp7fNUk45SfM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1097738785140800","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"189"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121230335CED502CB8AA02057DD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5
